---
title: "Longxiang Wu"
---

![](longxiangwu.png){width=25%} 

## Professional


I am an enthusiastic data scientist with over ten years of experience collaborating with diverse partners across industry and technology. My work spans the full data pipeline — from exploratory analysis to production-ready predictive models. Notable projects include developing sales forecasting models for JD.com and conducting in-depth logistics data analysis to drive operational efficiency. I am a proud member of the Irish Statistical Association, reflecting my commitment to staying engaged with the broader data science community and upholding rigorous statistical standards in my practice.   


## Personal

I am currently at an exciting and grounded stage of life — single, living with my family, and fully invested in both personal growth and professional development. I find that the closeness and support of family life brings a sense of perspective and balance that quietly informs the way I work: with patience, care, and a long-term mindset. Outside of data and algorithms, I am someone who values meaningful connections, continuous learning, and the belief that the best work comes from those who bring their whole selves to what they do.


## Contact

Want to chat?  Go ahead, pipe up!  Feel free to contact me on [email](mailto:longxiangwu@outlook.com){target="_blank"}, or [LinkedIn](www.linkedin.com/in/longxiang-wu-003506106){target="_blank"}. I hope to hear from you!

## Books I Am Reading

<center>
:::: {style="display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start;"}
::: {style="flex-shrink: 0;"}
![The Elements of Statistical Learning](ESL.jpg){style="height: 300px; width: auto;"}
:::
::: {style="flex-shrink: 0;"}
![Statistical Foudations of Data Science](SFDS.webp){style="height: 300px; width: auto;"}
:::
::: {style="flex-shrink: 0;"}
![Optimization for Data Analysis](ODA.jpg){style="height: 300px; width: auto;"}
:::
::: {style="flex-shrink: 0;"}
![Introduction to Algorithms](IA.jpg){style="height: 300px; width: auto;"}
:::
::::

:::: {style="display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start;"}
::: {style="flex-shrink: 0;"}
![Computer Age Statistical Inference](CASI.jpg){style="height: 300px; width: auto;"}
:::
::::
</center>



## Some Paintings by Claude Monet

<center>
:::: {style="display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start;"}
::: {style="flex-shrink: 0;"}
![](1.JPG){style="height: 300px; width: auto;"}
:::
::: {style="flex-shrink: 0;"}
![](2.JPEG){style="height: 300px; width: auto;"}
:::
::::

:::: {style="display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start;"}
::: {style="flex-shrink: 0;"}
![](3.JPEG){style="height: 300px; width: auto;"}
:::
::: {style="flex-shrink: 0;"}
![](4.JPEG){style="height: 300px; width: auto;"}
:::
::::

:::: {style="display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start;"}
::: {style="flex-shrink: 0;"}
![](6.JPEG){style="height: 300px; width: auto;"}
:::
::: {style="flex-shrink: 0;"}
![](5.JPEG){style="height: 300px; width: auto;"}
:::
::::

</center>
